domain: fusion: security x performance (security cost of a caching optimization)
axioms: Every place a security control sits on a hot path is a place a team will quietly weaken it for latency
Trust-the-index-skip-revalidation is a latency win to perf and a stale-secret window to security
Report only findings requiring BOTH parents; discard anything either alone catches
failure_mode: may invent an intersection that the literal code does not support (see f-022 refuted)
depends on parents having touched the same ground
emergent_yield: 0/1 (f-022 promoted by emergence gate, then refuted at verify; net independent here)
